full_text: I've got some translations for the JJK Mojalo epilogue featuring our goat! Yes, yours and mine, Old Man Toto. So let's get into this four-page extra. Alright so the epilogue begins and we have Yuka, Tsurugi, Maru, and Cross all just chillin'. They're all just hanging out lounging together in this room. And Tsurugi is looking at his high-tech wrist communication device thing and he says, What exactly is a Vibra-slap? And Yuka says, Oh, you know, it's that instrument that goes kkrrrrrrrrrrrrrngggggggg Tsurugi says, Oh, is there a musical instrument store around here that would have something like that? And Yuka says, Are you going to buy one? It's better to order something like that online. And Tsurugi says no, I need it today. Miyaguni-san asked me for it. And Yuka says, Oh, brother, I love seeing you exploited by Miyaguni-san. We then cut to Miyaguni's office where we see that Tsurugi has placed a Vibra-slap on her desk and she says, sorry for the trouble, it's just that my master asked me for it. He's going to be returning to Japan after a long time. Tsurugi looks surprised and says, master, wasn't he just your teacher? Miyaguni says, no, he's not from the new shadow style school. He was my master as a sorcerer. And Tsurugi says, oh wow, this is the first time I'm hearing of that. And Miyaguni says, yeah, you know, at this age, I end up forgetting who I told what. Tsurugi thinks to himself, I wonder if it would be rude to ask how old she is now. Miyaguni then picks up the Viberslap as she's reminiscing and she thinks, well, it's not like I was under his tutelage for that long. He was someone very devoted to his wife, a husband of the kind you don't see much anymore. We then cut into a flashback with a young Miyaguni and she's remembering Toto's words to her. He says, Chiharu, you cling too much to anger. You have the talent to be a sorcerer, but you must not use that anger to fight without a purpose. Never forget that. We then come out of the flashback and see Miyaguni bring the Viberslap even closer to her as she thinks back on Toto's words. He says, because of love, we fear. Because of love, we become enraged. And because of love, we fight. Because before we were sorcerers, we are humans. We then cut to Toto aura farming on a sand dune in a desert as Miyaguni says he was quite the interesting person. We then see a woman approach Toto from behind and he says, can you still walk? And she says, don't treat me like a little old lady, darling. Toto says, I'm sorry, my wife. And the two of them walk off in the desert together. And that's where the epilogue ends. And yeah, I know you noticed those ponytails. I'm pretty sure our goat bagged his idol to Kata. So that's the epilogue. Toto is getting his Viberslap ready for his return because as we know, Yuji wanted to recruit him and Nobara in order to set the path for the future. So honestly, I could see another sequel here if Gege wants to do it. Y'all let me know your thoughts.
